/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnav_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/nav_interfaces/libnav_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/nav_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/nav_interfaces/msg/_bot_pose_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vboxuser/ros_ws/build/nav_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libnav_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libnav_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
